title: Add مطبخي الذكي AI to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Cooking up pixels
gist.blurb: مطبخي الذكي AI (My Smart Kitchen AI) just joined the showcase. It uses Pollinations to dynamically generate mouth-watering images for every recipe, from pastries to traditional mains.
gist.summary: Added 'مطبخي الذكي AI', an AI-driven culinary platform, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: The community can now explore a new project that leverages our image generation API to visualize recipes dynamically.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy kitchen scene representing the 'Smart Kitchen AI' app. Polly the bee wearing a chef's hat, looking at a retro monitor or recipe book that displays pixelated food/pastries.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny chef's hat, hovering in a warm rustic kitchen. She is looking at a retro computer monitor displaying a delicious pixelated pastry. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny chef's hat, hovering in a warm rustic kitchen. She is looking at a retro computer monitor displaying a delicious pixelated pastry. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
